text:
Mfers were telling me its a skills and prompt issue. 

You all look super silly right now. 

25 years developing, I know what I'm doing - finally acknowledged. I'm glad they are trying to address this, but a month to get this out is crummy.

I do appreciate all the fine folks at https://twitter.com/ClaudeDevs/status/2047371123185287223
